arguments.file_text:
# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

- **Scope**: `Enterprise.slnx` — 5 projects (Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web)
- **Packages centralized**: 8 unique packages into `Directory.Packages.props`
- **Projects converted**: 5/5
- **Shared build files updated**: `Common.props` (removed `Version` from shared `PackageReference`)
- **MSBuild properties inlined and removed**:
  - `$(BlobsVersion)` (12.24.0) — was in `Directory.Build.props`, used by Api.csproj for `Azure.Storage.Blobs`
  - `$(HostingVersion)` (8.0.1) — was in `Directory.Build.props`, used by Core.csproj for `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting`
- **Conditional `PackageVersion` entries**: `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` uses TFM-conditioned versions (6.0.36 for net6.0, 8.0.11 for net8.0) in `Directory.Packages.props`

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

Two version conflicts were detected and resolved by aligning to the highest version (per user decision):

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **10.0.1** (highest). Core and Legacy now resolve 10.0.1 instead of 9.0.0 and 8.0.5, respectively. This is a major version bump for Legacy (8.x → 10.x) and a minor bump for Core (9.x → 10.x).

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)` property) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **12.24.0** (highest). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0. This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged

| Project | Package | Version |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — Three packages changed versions due to alignment to the highest version. The build and restore succeeded, but:

- **Legacy.csproj** received a major version bump for `System.Text.Json` (8.0.5 → 10.0.1). Legacy targets `net6.0`, and System.Text.Json 10.0.1 does not officially support net6.0 (build warning present). Review Legacy for any breaking API changes.
- **Core.csproj** received a minor version bump for `System.Text.Json` (9.0.0 → 10.0.1). Lower risk but should be validated.
- **Legacy.csproj** received a minor version bump for `Azure.Storage.Blobs` (12.19.0 → 12.24.0). Same major version; generally safe.

Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for the Legacy and Core projects.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Run `dotnet test`** — Validate runtime behavior beyond build success, especially for Legacy and Core which received version bumps.
2. **Legacy TFM upgrade** — Legacy targets `net6.0`, which is end-of-life. Several transitive dependencies (Microsoft.Extensions.*, System.Text.Json 10.0.1) do not officially support net6.0. Consider upgrading to `net8.0` or later.
3. **Review System.Text.Json 10.x changes** — Legacy was on 8.0.5 and Core was on 9.0.0. Review the [release notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/whats-new/dotnet-10/overview) for any breaking API changes.
4. **Api multi-targeting** — Api targets both `net6.0` and `net8.0`. The same TFM deprecation concerns from Legacy apply to the net6.0 target.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

- **`baseline.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion. Available for manual validation and troubleshooting.
- **`after-cpm.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion. Compare with baseline using [MSBuild Binary Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
- **`baseline-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project before conversion.
- **`after-cpm-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project after conversion.
- **`convert-to-cpm.md`** — This report file, suitable for use as a pull request description or team review artifact.

Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior. If any regressions are found in Legacy or Core, consider using `VersionOverride` to pin those projects to their previous versions while investigating.

# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

- **Scope**: `Enterprise.slnx` — 5 projects (Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web)
- **Packages centralized**: 8 unique packages into `Directory.Packages.props`
- **Projects converted**: 5/5
- **Shared build files updated**: `Common.props` (removed `Version` from shared `PackageReference`)
- **MSBuild properties inlined and removed**:
  - `$(BlobsVersion)` (12.24.0) — was in `Directory.Build.props`, used by Api.csproj for `Azure.Storage.Blobs`
  - `$(HostingVersion)` (8.0.1) — was in `Directory.Build.props`, used by Core.csproj for `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting`
- **Conditional `PackageVersion` entries**: `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` uses TFM-conditioned versions (6.0.36 for net6.0, 8.0.11 for net8.0) in `Directory.Packages.props`

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

Two version conflicts were detected and resolved by aligning to the highest version (per user decision):

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **10.0.1** (highest). Core and Legacy now resolve 10.0.1 instead of 9.0.0 and 8.0.5, respectively. This is a major version bump for Legacy (8.x → 10.x) and a minor bump for Core (9.x → 10.x).

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)` property) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **12.24.0** (highest). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0. This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged

| Project | Package | Version |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj [net6.0] | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |

| Api.csproj [net6.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj [net6.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj [net8.0] | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj [net8.0] | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — Three packages changed versions due to alignment to the highest version. The build and restore succeeded, but:

- **Legacy.csproj** received a major version bump for `System.Text.Json` (8.0.5 → 10.0.1). Legacy targets `net6.0`, and System.Text.Json 10.0.1 does not officially support net6.0 (build warning present). Review Legacy for any breaking API changes.
- **Core.csproj** received a minor version bump for `System.Text.Json` (9.0.0 → 10.0.1). Lower risk but should be validated.
- **Legacy.csproj** received a minor version bump for `Azure.Storage.Blobs` (12.19.0 → 12.24.0). Same major version; generally safe.

Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for the Legacy and Core projects.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Run `dotnet test`** — Validate runtime behavior beyond build success, especially for Legacy and Core which received version bumps.
2. **Legacy TFM upgrade** — Legacy targets `net6.0`, which is end-of-life. Several transitive dependencies (Microsoft.Extensions.*, System.Text.Json 10.0.1) do not officially support net6.0. Consider upgrading to `net8.0` or later.
3. **Review System.Text.Json 10.x changes** — Legacy was on 8.0.5 and Core was on 9.0.0. Review the [release notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/whats-new/dotnet-10/overview) for any breaking API changes.
4. **Api multi-targeting** — Api targets both `net6.0` and `net8.0`. The same TFM deprecation concerns from Legacy apply to the net6.0 target.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

- **`baseline.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion. Available for manual validation and troubleshooting.
- **`after-cpm.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion. Compare with baseline using [MSBuild Binary Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
